product.name: Archie
product.default_user: a person who wants a working independent application without learning model, runtime, repository, or deployment internals
product_is_not: a chatbot that only emits mockups

architecture.sideways: deterministic objectives, state, authority, protected reality, and proof-of-done
architecture.archie: learned planning, interpretation, composition, adaptation, and trajectory learning
architecture.workspace: event-sourced objective, task, run, artifact, review, evidence, promotion, and rollback record
architecture.generated_app: an independent runnable and exportable artifact
architecture.distillation: offline compilation and evaluation of successful and failed trajectories

consumer_flow: describe an app in ordinary language or attach an existing project
derive objective, constraints, integrations, human gates, and proof-of-done
refine conversationally or through direct preview actions
run, install, export, duplicate, or remove the independent app
optionally teach Archie from the complete trajectory

surfaces.label: Create
surfaces.job: accept one ordinary-language outcome plus optional files, screenshots, data, or an existing project

surfaces.label: Workspace
surfaces.job: show the live runnable app and accept refinements while exposing only unavoidable human gates

surfaces.label: Apps
surfaces.job: reopen, run, edit, duplicate, export, and remove independent generated applications

surfaces.label: Teach
surfaces.job: review a complete trajectory, compile a distillation pack, and evaluate a candidate without implying promotion

surfaces.label: Evidence
surfaces.job: inspect exact requests, actions, files, tests, failures, artifacts, receipts, and digests

runtime.selection: automatically prefer an admitted native Archie checkpoint
runtime.fallback: truthfully use deterministic or receipt-bound teacher-assisted creation when native capability is unavailable
runtime.teacher_runtime_coupling: teacher assistance may help create an app but may not become an undeclared runtime dependency of the generated app

samples.role: bounded demonstrations of general creation capability; samples may never define the core product
samples.required_generality: include unrelated business, consumer, creative, or data applications
samples.lbtb_po_processor: one generated real-world business sample equivalent in product status to the Sideways self-hosting sample

forbidden: sample-specific language in global product navigation
generated apps trapped as cards inside Archie
manual provider setup before the first request
cosmetic distillation without a compiled and evaluated candidate

mobile.default_layout: one task, one preview, one primary action, progressive detail drawers
mobile.desktop_relationship: a larger workspace for the same product, not a separate product

claim_boundary: This contract defines the product and required evidence flow. It does not claim that an admitted model can already generate arbitrary applications, that a generated application has been deployed, or that any distillation candidate has passed promotion gates.
